description: Departmental permission may be given for supervised research projects, individual study, or directed readings.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of the following
    • Minimum third-year standing
    • minimum cumulative GPA of 5.0 in the last 15 units of coursework.
repeatableCatalogText: May be taken more than once for credit to a maximum of 3 units.
supplementalNotes: • A student may take up to a maximum of 3 units from BIOL 490D, BIOL 490A, BIOL 490B, BIOL 490E, BIOL 490F, BIOL 490G, BIOL 490H, BIOL 490J, BIOL 490K, MRNE 400.
title: Directed Studies and Research in Marine Biology
